name: codex-background
description: Add a positionable character illustration to the Codex workspace without replacing its native background.

interface.shortDescription: Place character art in the Codex workspace background.
interface.longDescription: Places local transparent character art in the main Codex workspace through a loopback-only CDP sidecar. Size, X/Y placement, opacity, and illustration-only blur are configurable while native background colors and surfaces stay intact. It leaves the signed ChatGPT.app bundle untouched.
